---
title: "Leaderboards have moved"
description: "The SABRhood player leaderboards now live in the Player Desk."
---

::: {.page-intro}
<span class="eyebrow">New data hub</span>

# Player leaderboards have moved

The rebuilt [Player Desk](players.qmd) combines performance boards, recent-form signals, quality-of-contact measures, and pitcher suppression in one place.
:::
